name: manage_index_settings
description: Get or update the search configuration of an Algolia index. Settings control which attributes are searchable, how results are ranked, which facets are available, and many other relevance behaviors. Changes take effect after re-indexing.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: The name of the index to configure.

parameters.name: searchableAttributes
parameters.description: Ordered list of attributes used for text search. Attributes listed first have higher priority.

parameters.name: attributesForFaceting
parameters.description: Attributes that can be used for filtering and faceting. Prefix with 'filterOnly()' for filter-only or 'searchable()' for searchable facets.

parameters.name: customRanking
parameters.description: Custom ranking criteria applied after Algolia's default ranking. Use 'asc()' or 'desc()' with attribute names.
